message:
test(cross-workstream): add CW-053/054/055 for search↔analytics drilldown roundtrips

Three new integration tests exercising the analytics drilldown flow:

CW-053 — Search ↔ Analytics drilldown roundtrip:
  Verifies that drilling down from an analytics data point correctly
  transitions to the Search surface with the dimension's agent, source,
  and time range filters applied, overriding any previously inherited
  analytics-level filters (e.g. codex overrides claude_code, Local
  overrides Remote).

CW-054 — Drilldown back-stack preserves analytics selection:
  Confirms that after a drilldown, the Analytics surface is pushed onto
  the view stack so that popping back restores both the surface and the
  user's previous selection index (e.g. selection=2 on Breakdowns view).

CW-055 — Inline badges match detail modal analytics values:
  End-to-end render test: populates search results with known token
  estimates, verifies inline mini-analytics badges ("● 1,500 tok",
  "2 msgs") appear in the search list, then opens the detail modal on
  the Analytics tab and asserts the same totals appear ("2 messages",
  "Tokens: 1.5K"). Uses ftui_harness::buffer_to_text for rendered
  output assertions.

Adds shared helper `make_session_hit()` and `render_app_text()` for
constructing test fixtures and capturing rendered TUI output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
